evals.prompt: Set up an npm workspaces monorepo with 3 packages: api (NestJS), web (Next.js), and shared (TypeScript types + utils). Configure: shared dependency management, cross-package imports, and build ordering.
evals.expected_output: Monorepo structure with workspaces, shared package, and proper build configuration

assertions.name: workspace_config
assertions.description: Root package.json with workspaces array

assertions.name: shared_package
assertions.description: packages/shared with TypeScript types and utils

assertions.name: cross_imports
assertions.description: api and web import from @myapp/shared

assertions.name: build_order
assertions.description: shared builds before api and web

assertions.name: dev_script
assertions.description: Root dev script runs all packages concurrently

evals.prompt: Add a new microservice to our existing npm workspaces monorepo. The service is called 'notification-service' (NestJS). It needs to share types with the existing api and web packages.
evals.expected_output: New package added with proper workspace registration and shared type imports

assertions.name: new_package
assertions.description: packages/notification-service directory created

assertions.name: workspace_registered
assertions.description: Added to root workspaces array

assertions.name: shared_types
assertions.description: Imports types from @myapp/shared

assertions.name: independent_deps
assertions.description: Has its own package.json with NestJS dependencies

assertions.name: build_integration
assertions.description: Integrated into root build and dev scripts

evals.prompt: Configure CI/CD for our monorepo so that changes to the api package only trigger api tests and deploy, not web tests. Use GitHub Actions with path filters.
evals.expected_output: Selective CI pipeline using path filters and conditional jobs

assertions.name: path_filters
assertions.description: Workflow uses paths/paths-ignore filters

assertions.name: conditional_jobs
assertions.description: Jobs run conditionally based on which package changed

assertions.name: shared_triggers_all
assertions.description: Changes to shared/ trigger both api and web pipelines

assertions.name: independent_deploy
assertions.description: Each package deploys independently

assertions.name: caching
assertions.description: npm cache shared across all package pipelines

evals.prompt: Our monorepo has dependency conflicts — api uses axios 0.x and web uses axios 1.x. Both need different versions. How do we handle this without breaking either?
evals.expected_output: Resolution via npm workspace nesting, overrides, or version alignment strategy

assertions.name: identifies_conflict
assertions.description: Explains the version conflict clearly

assertions.name: resolution_strategy
assertions.description: Proposes nesting, overrides, or alignment

assertions.name: no_force_dedup
assertions.description: Does not suggest npm dedupe --force blindly

assertions.name: testing_after
assertions.description: Recommends testing both packages after resolution

assertions.name: prevention
assertions.description: Suggests constraints or renovate for preventing future conflicts

evals.prompt: Convert our repo from two separate Git repos (api and web) into a single monorepo with npm workspaces. Preserve git history for both repos.
evals.expected_output: Migration plan preserving history using git subtree or filter-repo, with workspace setup

assertions.name: history_preserved
assertions.description: Git history from both repos preserved in the monorepo

assertions.name: subtree_or_filter
assertions.description: Uses git subtree add or git filter-repo for migration

assertions.name: workspace_setup
assertions.description: npm workspaces configured after merge

assertions.name: ci_updated
assertions.description: CI/CD updated for monorepo structure

assertions.name: verification
assertions.description: Steps to verify history and functionality after migration
